about: Looking closely at the weary walls and bastions of the castle, one can read the traces of different civilizations like looking into a time machine. The massive and rough stones of the Urartians at the very bottom, the orderly masonry of Rome and Byzantium in the middle, and the elegant architectural restorations of the Seljuks, Artuqids, and Ottomans at the top can be clearly understood through the color and cut of the stone, acting as a clear history book.
